title_zh: AI 用量與 Token 經濟雷達
method_en: Is the demand real? Answered from the USAGE side, not the spend side. The rest of Tier III derives demand from capex (/compute → /cwengine → /payback); this card reads actual token consumption: disclosed token throughput, per-token price deflation, and realized revenue per token. The usage-vs-spend scissors is the bubble's final judge. Curated usage map (L1/L2) + disclosure-ledger & price-curve quant (L3) + Claude synthesis with rules fallback (L4/L5). Estimates are estimates — every curated number carries a tier and an as-of date. Not investment advice.
method_zh: 需求是真的嗎?從「用量端」而非「支出端」回答。Tier III 其他卡由 CapEx 推需求(/compute → /cwengine → /payback);這張卡讀實際 token 消耗:揭露的 token 產出量、每 token 價格通縮、每 token 已實現營收。用量與支出的剪刀差,才是泡沫的最終裁判。策展用量地圖(L1/L2)+ 揭露台帳與價格曲線量化(L3)+ Claude 合成與規則後備(L4/L5)。估計就是估計——每個策展數字都帶證據等級與資料時點。非投資建議。
positioning_en: /aibubble's supply-demand scissors uses npm downloads — a developer-adoption proxy. This card is the deeper token-level read of the same question, so it references /aibubble's capex growth number rather than restating the npm side. /compute derives silicon demand from capex; this card is its mirror: from consumed tokens back to silicon durability.
positioning_zh: /aibubble 的供需剪刀差用 npm 下載量——開發者採用的代理指標。本卡是同一個問題更深一層的 token 級判讀,因此引用 /aibubble 的 capex 增速而不重寫 npm 端。/compute 從 capex 往下推矽需求;本卡是它的鏡像:從實際消耗的 token 回望矽需求的耐久性。

platforms.name: Google (Gemini + internal)

points.src_en: Sundar Pichai, I/O 2025 retrospective: 9.7T monthly tokens in Apr-2024
points.src_zh: Pichai 於 I/O 2025 回顧:2024 年 4 月每月 9.7T tokens
I/O 2025 主題演講:每月 480T tokens(年增約 50 倍)

points.src_en: Alphabet Q2-2025 earnings call: 980T monthly tokens
Curated 2026-world approximation, extrapolated from disclosure cadence
points.src_zh: 策展 2026 世界近似值,依揭露節奏外插

platforms.note_en: Largest disclosed volume — but mostly internal (AI Overviews, Workspace): no market price on most of it.
platforms.note_zh: 揭露量最大——但多為內部消耗(AI Overviews、Workspace):大部分沒有市場價格。

platforms.name: Microsoft (Foundry / Azure AI)

points.src_en: Nadella, FY25Q3 earnings: 'over 100T tokens this quarter, up 5× YoY' → ≈33.3T/month
points.src_zh: Nadella FY25Q3 法說:「本季處理逾 100T tokens,年增 5 倍」→ 約 33.3T/月

points.src_en: Curated 2026-world approximation from Azure AI growth commentary
points.src_zh: 策展 2026 世界近似值,依 Azure AI 成長口徑推估

platforms.note_en: Platform (Foundry) tokens — enterprise-skewed mix, monetized via Azure consumption + Copilot seats.
platforms.note_zh: 平台(Foundry)token——偏企業組合,經 Azure 用量計費 + Copilot 席次變現。

platforms.name: OpenAI API

points.src_en: DevDay 2025 statement: ~6B tokens/min on the API → ≈259T/month
points.src_zh: DevDay 2025 聲明:API 每分鐘約 60 億 tokens → 約 259T/月

points.src_en: Curated 2026-world approximation (agent workloads accelerating API mix)
points.src_zh: 策展 2026 世界近似值(agent 工作負載推升 API 占比)

platforms.note_en: API only — excludes ChatGPT consumer inference, so the class-1 (per-token priced) volume read.
platforms.note_zh: 僅 API——不含 ChatGPT 消費端推論,即第 1 類(按 token 計價)的量讀值。

platforms.name: OpenRouter (aggregator sample)

points.src_zh: OpenRouter 公開每週 token 看板,換算為月

points.src_en: Public aggregate, 2026-world approximation — the live collector samples this
points.src_zh: 公開彙總,2026 世界近似值——live 收集器即抽樣此源

platforms.note_en: Small in absolute terms but the only fully public multi-model aggregate — a developer-long-tail sample, declared as such.
platforms.note_zh: 絕對值小,但是唯一完全公開的多模型彙總——屬開發者長尾樣本,如實聲明。

token_ledger.note_en: Dated public disclosures + curated 2026-world approximations, each point tier-tagged. Scopes differ by platform (per-model vs per-platform, API-only vs internal) — growth rates are computed within a platform, never across scopes.
token_ledger.note_zh: 有日期的公開揭露 + 策展 2026 世界近似值,每個點都標證據等級。各平台口徑不一(逐模型 vs 全平台、僅 API vs 含內部)——增速只在同平台內計算,絕不跨口徑相比。

curves.note_en: Official price pages (T1) except the 2026-world point (T3 EST).
curves.note_zh: 官方價格頁(T1),僅 2026 世界點為 T3 估計。

curves.note_en: Sticky for two years, then a step-cut with Opus 4.5 — deflation arrives in steps, not a smooth curve.
curves.note_zh: 兩年不動價,到 Opus 4.5 一次階梯式降價——通縮是階梯,不是平滑曲線。

curves.note_en: Median blended price across listed models — the live collector refreshes this point from the keyless OpenRouter API.
curves.note_zh: 上架模型的混合價中位數——live 收集器從免 key 的 OpenRouter API 更新此點。

price_deflation.caveat_en: Capability-adjusted deflation is understated by design: the same list price buys a smarter model each year (GPT-4 → 5.2-class), so true $/quality falls faster than $/token — but 'smarter per token' cannot be measured precisely.
price_deflation.caveat_zh: 「能力調整後」的通縮天生被低估:同樣牌價每年買到更聰明的模型(GPT-4 → 5.2 級),所以每單位品質的價格跌得比每 token 更快——但「同 token 更聰明」無法精確量化。

labs.name: OpenAI

points.src_en: 2025 reported revenue run-rate ~$13B; tokens = DevDay API statement
points.src_zh: 2025 年報導營收 run-rate 約 $13B;token 量取 DevDay API 聲明

points.align_note: 營收 run-rate $25B 對齊 /payback KB v2 2026-07-02
points.src_en: Canonical run-rate per /payback KB v2; tokens = curated approximation
points.src_zh: 正典 run-rate 同 /payback KB v2;token 量為策展近似

labs.note_en: Realized $/M spans ALL monetization (subscriptions + API) over API-scope tokens — an implied blend, flagged EST.
labs.note_zh: 已實現 $/M 是「全部變現(訂閱+API)÷ API 口徑 token」的推算混合值,標 EST。

labs.name: Anthropic

points.align_note: 營收 run-rate $12B 對齊 /payback KB v2 2026-07-02
points.src_en: Canonical run-rate per /payback KB v2; token volume is our estimate (no disclosure)
points.src_zh: 正典 run-rate 同 /payback KB v2;token 量為我們的估計(無揭露)

labs.note_en: Single point — no trend computable. Enterprise/API-heavy mix monetizes above OpenAI's blend.
labs.note_zh: 僅一個時點——無法算趨勢。偏企業/API 的組合,每 token 變現高於 OpenAI 混合值。

serving_cost_floor.assumption_en: H100-class at ~1,000 tok/s sustained batched inference → 3.6M tokens/hr → $2.16 ÷ 3.6 ≈ $0.60/M. Throughput assumption is the whole estimate.
serving_cost_floor.assumption_zh: H100 級以約 1,000 tok/s 批次推論持續輸出 → 每小時 3.6M tokens → $2.16 ÷ 3.6 ≈ $0.60/M。吞吐假設就是整個估計的關鍵。

scissors.capex_align_note: 對齊 /aibubble 2026-07-02 剪刀差供給端:capex +80.6% YoY

composite.verdict_en: REAL-AND-COMPOUNDING — usage dollars and units both outrun spend
composite.verdict_zh: REAL-AND-COMPOUNDING — 用量的美元與單位都跑贏支出;需求是真的且在複利

subscores.name_zh: token 單位 vs capex 增速
token 美元 vs capex 增速

usage_read.summary_en: Units are winning; dollars are catching up. Token unit growth runs 178.9%/yr vs capex 80.6%/yr — a 2.22× unit ratio, the strongest side of the scissors (usage_vs_spend 86.0). But blended flagship deflation of -37.2%/yr drags token-DOLLAR growth to 75.1%/yr, a dollar ratio of 0.93× — dollars still trail capex, barely. The saving grace: realized $/M holds well above the cost floor — OpenAI $4.34/M and Anthropic $7.69/M vs a $0.6/M serving floor (7.2× markup), so monetization (71.6) is not collapsing. Elasticity 95.5 confirms every price cut buys more than proportional volume. Verdict: usage is real and compounding; the dollar scissors (58.9) is the only unhealed gap.
usage_read.summary_zh: 用量勝出，金額正在追趕。代幣單位成長178.9%/年對資本支出80.6%/年，單位比2.22×，是剪刀中最強的一側（usage_vs_spend 86.0）。但旗艦混合降價-37.2%/年把代幣「金額」成長壓到75.1%/年，金額比0.93×——金額仍略落後資本支出。關鍵支撐：實現$/M遠高於成本地板，OpenAI $4.34/M、Anthropic $7.69/M，對比$0.6/M服務地板（7.2×加價），故變現力(71.6)未崩。彈性95.5證明每次降價換來超比例的量。結論：用量真實且複利，唯金額剪刀(58.9)為未癒合缺口。

silicon_view.summary_en: Inference-led token growth is the durable pillar under the CapEx→wafer arc. Microsoft Foundry (230.3%/yr) and OpenRouter (205.6%/yr) show enterprise-app and aggregator classes accelerating fastest — these are inference workloads that ride N4/N5 + CoWoS regardless of any training pause. Google internal at 121.3%/yr and ×195.9 since 2024 anchors hyperscaler self-consumption. The 7.2× realized/floor markup means serving remains gross-margin positive, so token demand converts to sustained accelerator restocking, not one-off training bursts. TSMC exposure is indirect via NVIDIA/AMD/TPU, but inference volume — not training — now sets the wafer floor. Risk: if deflation outpaces volume, per-token revenue thins and softens the second-order pull on CoWoS capacity.
silicon_view.summary_zh: 以推論為主的代幣成長是CapEx→晶圓弧的耐久支柱。Microsoft Foundry(230.3%/年)與OpenRouter(205.6%/年)顯示企業應用與聚合器類別加速最快——這些是推論負載，無論訓練是否暫停都支撐N4/N5+CoWoS。Google內部121.3%/年、自2024年×195.9錨定超大規模自用。7.2×實現/地板加價意味服務仍為正毛利，故代幣需求轉為持續的加速器補貨而非一次性訓練爆發。台積電經由NVIDIA/AMD/TPU間接受惠，但推論量而非訓練量正設定晶圓地板。風險：若降價超越放量，單代幣營收變薄，將軟化對CoWoS產能的次級拉力。

thesis.direction_en: Compounding — but the dollar scissors is unhealed. Unit growth (2.22×) and elasticity (95.5) agree strongly; realized $/M holds above floor (7.2×); only dollar growth (0.93×) still trails capex. Because two of three signals align and the third is one deflation-inflection away from crossing, the call is real-and-compounding at medium-high confidence.
thesis.direction_zh: 複利——但金額剪刀尚未癒合。單位成長(2.22×)與彈性(95.5)高度一致；實現$/M守在地板上方(7.2×)；僅金額成長(0.93×)仍落後資本支出。三項訊號中兩項一致、第三項距離跨越僅差一個降價拐點，故判定為真實且複利，信心中偏高。

leading_signals.en: OpenRouter live market-median $/M — the only real-time price series; a stabilization or uptick flags deflation bottoming before quarterly disclosure.
leading_signals.zh: OpenRouter即時市場中位$/M——唯一即時價格序列；企穩或回升在季度揭露前預示降價觸底。

leading_signals.en: Aggregator token throughput (OpenRouter 55T/mo, 205.6%/yr) — leads platform-reported volumes by weeks as an unfiltered demand pulse.
leading_signals.zh: 聚合器代幣吞吐(OpenRouter 55T/月、205.6%/年)——作為未過濾需求脈搏，領先平台官方量數週。

leading_signals.en: Agent/tool-call token share — rising multi-step agent traffic lifts tokens-per-task and defends realized $/M ahead of revenue prints.
leading_signals.zh: 代理/工具呼叫代幣占比——多步代理流量上升拉高每任務代幣數，在營收公布前守住實現$/M。

leading_signals.en: Flagship list-price cut cadence — a cut steeper than -50%/yr without matching volume is the earliest deflation-spiral tell.
leading_signals.zh: 旗艦定價降幅節奏——降幅陡於-50%/年而無對應放量，是降價螺旋最早徵兆。

leading_signals.en: H100/H200 spot rental ($2.16/hr basis) — a falling serving-cost floor widens or compresses the 7.2× markup and moves before margin disclosure.
leading_signals.zh: H100/H200現貨租金(以$2.16/時為基準)——服務成本地板下移改變7.2×加價，先於毛利揭露變動。

scenarios.name_zh: 未付費成長磨耗（現狀延續）
scenarios.trigger_en: Unit ratio stays 1.5–2.5× (now 2.22×) while dollar ratio holds 0.85–0.99× (now 0.93×) for 2+ quarters.

scenarios.name_en: Real and compounding — dollars cross capex
scenarios.name_zh: 真實且複利——金額跨越資本支出
scenarios.trigger_en: Token-dollar growth crosses above capex growth (dollar ratio >1×) as agent monetization lifts realized $/M ≥ current $4.34/M.
scenarios.trigger_zh: 代幣金額成長跨越資本支出（金額比>1×），代理變現推動實現$/M≥現$4.34/M。

scenarios.trigger_en: Flagship blended deflation accelerates past -60%/yr without volume acceleration; realized $/M rolls below $4/M.
scenarios.trigger_zh: 旗艦混合降價加速超過-60%/年而無放量；實現$/M跌破$4/M。

scenarios.trigger_en: Token UNIT growth falls below capex growth (80.6%/yr) for 2 consecutive quarters.
scenarios.trigger_zh: 代幣單位成長連續2季低於資本支出成長(80.6%/年)。

falsification.en: Token UNIT growth falls below capex growth (80.6%/yr) for 2 consecutive quarters — the Tier III bubble-confirmation line.
falsification.zh: 代幣單位成長連續2季低於資本支出成長(80.6%/年)——第三層泡沫確認線。

falsification.en: Realized $/M breaks below the serving-cost floor trend (currently 7.2× the $0.6/M floor), signalling volume is bought only by pricing below cost.
falsification.zh: 實現$/M跌破服務成本地板趨勢（現為$0.6/M地板的7.2×），代表放量僅靠低於成本定價換得。

falsification.en: Elasticity inverts — a >30% price cut fails to lift volume, breaking the 95.5 elasticity score that underpins the compounding call.
falsification.zh: 彈性反轉——降價>30%未能拉抬量，打破支撐複利判斷的95.5彈性分。

early_warning.en: OpenRouter live market-median $/M ($0.75 now) — deflation-inflection tell.
early_warning.zh: OpenRouter即時市場中位$/M（現$0.75）——降價拐點徵兆。
聚合器代幣吞吐（OpenRouter 55T/月）成長脈搏。

early_warning.en: H100/H200 spot rental basis ($2.16/hr) → serving-cost floor.
early_warning.zh: H100/H200現貨租金基準（$2.16/時）→服務成本地板。

early_warning.en: Flagship list-price cut cadence vs the -50%/yr line.
early_warning.zh: 旗艦定價降幅節奏對比-50%/年線。
代理/工具呼叫代幣占比與每任務代幣數。

early_warning.en: Platform token-volume disclosures (Google 1900T, OpenAI 480T, MS 110T) — within-scope growth only.
early_warning.zh: 平台代幣量揭露（Google 1900T、OpenAI 480T、MS 110T）——僅限同口徑成長。

early_warning.en: Realized $/M run-rate (OpenAI $4.34, Anthropic $7.69) vs capex growth 80.6%/yr — the dollar-scissors crossing.
early_warning.zh: 實現$/M運行率（OpenAI $4.34、Anthropic $7.69）對比資本支出成長80.6%/年——金額剪刀交叉點。

usage_map.desc_en: OpenAI / Anthropic / Google APIs sold by the token. The only usage class with a clean market price — every price cut here is a demand experiment with a published result.
usage_map.desc_zh: OpenAI / Anthropic / Google 按 token 賣的 API。唯一有乾淨市場價格的用量類別——這裡的每次降價都是一場有公開結果的需求實驗。
usage_map.silicon_en: Most price-elastic: deflation → more tokens → inference silicon. Demand durability tracks workload growth directly, contract-light.
usage_map.silicon_zh: 價格彈性最高:通縮 → 更多 token → 推論矽需求。需求耐久性直接跟著工作負載走,合約綁定薄。

usage_map.name_zh: 巨頭內部消耗(搜尋·廣告·副駕)
usage_map.econ_en: Internal cost center — no market price
usage_map.econ_zh: 內部成本中心——無市場價格
usage_map.desc_en: Google AI Overviews / Workspace, Microsoft Copilot surfaces. The largest token volumes on the board, consumed with zero per-token revenue — funded by the core business as a strategic cost.
usage_map.desc_zh: Google AI Overviews / Workspace、Microsoft Copilot 介面。看板上最大的 token 量,卻沒有任何按 token 的收入——由本業當策略成本買單。
usage_map.silicon_en: Durable as long as the core cash machine funds it (Google→TPU, MSFT→mixed) — but it is strategy-funded, not price-signal-funded: it cannot validate unit economics.
usage_map.silicon_zh: 只要本業現金機器還買單就耐久(Google→TPU、MSFT→混搭)——但這是策略出資而非價格訊號出資:它無法驗證單位經濟。

usage_map.desc_en: M365 Copilot, coding assistants, vertical SaaS. Monetizes tokens well above API list price via seats — the highest realized $/M-tokens class.
usage_map.desc_zh: M365 Copilot、程式助理、垂直 SaaS。透過席次把 token 變現在 API 牌價之上——已實現 $/M tokens 最高的類別。
usage_map.silicon_en: Contract-durable but seat growth saturates; silicon demand grows with usage-per-seat (agents inside apps), not seat count.
usage_map.silicon_zh: 有合約耐久性但席次成長會飽和;矽需求跟著每席用量(應用內的 agent)走,而非席次數。

usage_map.desc_en: ChatGPT / Gemini consumer tiers. Huge token volume, thin per-token monetization (free users consume, few pay), churn-sensitive.
usage_map.desc_zh: ChatGPT / Gemini 消費者版。token 量巨大、每 token 變現極薄(免費用戶消耗、少數人付費),對流失敏感。
usage_map.silicon_en: Volume anchor for inference capacity, but the least defensible revenue per token — first class to be margin-squeezed by deflation.
usage_map.silicon_zh: 推論產能的量錨,但每 token 收入最不可守——通縮下最先被擠壓毛利的類別。

usage_map.econ_zh: API token,每任務 10–100 倍消耗
usage_map.desc_en: Agentic coding / research / ops loops: each task burns 10–100× the tokens of a chat turn. The marginal growth engine of 2026 token volume — and the least proven monetization.
usage_map.desc_zh: Agent 化的寫程式/研究/維運迴圈:每個任務燒掉聊天回合 10–100 倍的 token。2026 年 token 量的邊際成長引擎——也是變現最未經證明的類別。
usage_map.silicon_en: If agents monetize, inference silicon demand compounds independent of user growth; if not, this volume is deflation-subsidized burn.
usage_map.silicon_zh: 若 agent 變現成立,推論矽需求可脫離用戶成長自行複利;若不成立,這些量就是被通縮補貼的燒錢。

indicator_dictionary.what_en: Monthly/quarterly tokens processed, as disclosed by platforms (Google I/O & earnings, Microsoft earnings, OpenAI statements, OpenRouter public aggregate).
indicator_dictionary.what_zh: 各平台揭露的每月/每季處理 token 量(Google I/O 與法說、Microsoft 法說、OpenAI 聲明、OpenRouter 公開彙總)。
indicator_dictionary.why_en: The only direct read of AI demand in units — everything else on Tier III infers demand from spend.
indicator_dictionary.why_zh: 唯一以「單位」直讀 AI 需求的指標——Tier III 其他卡都是從支出反推需求。
indicator_dictionary.threshold_en: Token growth below capex growth for 2 consecutive readings = bubble-confirmation signal.
indicator_dictionary.threshold_zh: token 增速連兩次讀值低於 capex 增速 = 泡沫確認訊號。

indicator_dictionary.what_en: Flagship-model API list price per M tokens (3:1 input:output blend), 2023→2026, annualized change.
indicator_dictionary.what_zh: 旗艦模型 API 牌價($/M tokens,輸入:輸出 3:1 混合),2023→2026 年化變化。
indicator_dictionary.why_en: Deflation is the engine of volume growth AND the tax on monetization — the same number drives both sides of the scissors.
indicator_dictionary.why_zh: 通縮既是量成長的引擎,也是變現的稅——同一個數字同時驅動剪刀差的兩邊。
indicator_dictionary.threshold_en: >60%/yr deflation without matching volume acceleration = value destruction, not elasticity.
indicator_dictionary.threshold_zh: 年通縮 >60% 而量未同步加速 = 價值毀滅而非彈性。

indicator_dictionary.what_en: Implied AI end-revenue ÷ token volume — revenue run-rate divided by annualized tokens, per lab.
indicator_dictionary.what_zh: 推算的 AI 終端營收 ÷ token 量——營收 run-rate 除以年化 token 量,逐實驗室。
indicator_dictionary.why_en: List prices deflate ~45%/yr; whether REALIZED revenue per token holds is the whole monetization question.
indicator_dictionary.why_zh: 牌價每年通縮約 45%;「已實現」每 token 收入撐不撐得住,就是變現問題的全部。
indicator_dictionary.threshold_en: Realized $/M falling while volume decelerates = the worst quadrant.
indicator_dictionary.threshold_zh: 已實現 $/M 下滑且量同時減速 = 最壞象限。

indicator_dictionary.what_en: Token growth (units and deflation-adjusted dollars) vs hyperscaler capex growth (+80.6% YoY, per /aibubble).
indicator_dictionary.what_zh: token 增速(單位與經通縮調整的美元)對比巨頭 capex 增速(+80.6% YoY,引 /aibubble)。
indicator_dictionary.why_en: The final judge: spend racing ahead of usage is the definition of a capacity bubble.
indicator_dictionary.why_zh: 最終裁判:支出跑在用量前面,就是產能泡沫的定義。
indicator_dictionary.threshold_en: Dollar-growth ratio <1× for 2 consecutive readings = SPEND-AHEAD-OF-USE.
indicator_dictionary.threshold_zh: 美元增速比 <1× 連兩次 = 支出領先用量。

indicator_dictionary.what_en: Compute cost to serve a million tokens, derived from open-market GPU rent (vast.ai H100 $2.16/hr, per /aibubble).
indicator_dictionary.what_zh: 供應一百萬 token 的算力成本,由公開市場 GPU 租金推導(vast.ai H100 $2.16/hr,引 /aibubble)。
indicator_dictionary.why_en: The floor under price deflation — prices can only deflate to cost; the gap to realized $/M is the serving margin.
indicator_dictionary.why_zh: 價格通縮的地板——價格最多通縮到成本;它與已實現 $/M 的差距就是推論毛利。
indicator_dictionary.threshold_en: Realized $/M < 2× cost floor = margin squeeze on the whole serving stack.
indicator_dictionary.threshold_zh: 已實現 $/M 低於成本地板 2 倍 = 整個推論鏈毛利受擠。

indicator_dictionary.name_zh: Agent 占 token 量比重
indicator_dictionary.what_en: Share of tokens consumed by agentic workloads (curated estimate — no platform discloses this split).
indicator_dictionary.what_zh: Agent 工作負載消耗的 token 占比(策展估計——沒有平台揭露此切分)。
indicator_dictionary.why_en: Agents are the marginal growth engine with the least proven monetization — the mix tells you how much growth is unproven.
indicator_dictionary.why_zh: Agent 是變現最未經證明的邊際成長引擎——占比告訴你有多少成長是未經證明的。
indicator_dictionary.threshold_en: >30% of volume from agents while realized $/M falls = growth built on unpaid workloads.
indicator_dictionary.threshold_zh: Agent 占量 >30% 且已實現 $/M 下滑 = 成長建立在沒人付錢的工作負載上。

blind_spots_en: Token disclosures are fragmentary and inconsistent in scope — per-model vs per-platform, API-only vs internal, input vs output vs cached tokens counted differently. Growth is computed within a platform only.
Capability-adjusted deflation cannot be measured precisely: the same price buys a smarter model, so $/token understates true deflation ('smarter at the same price ≠ the same token').
The OpenRouter live sample skews to the developer long tail — it does not represent enterprise direct contracts or hyperscaler internal traffic.
Internal token consumption (Google search AI, Workspace) has no market price — its monetization rate is unobservable by construction.
Realized $/M spreads subscription revenue over API-scope token counts — an implied blend, not an accounting figure.
Platform revenue run-rates and token volumes are disclosed at different dates; growth comparisons carry timing error.
The serving-cost floor rests on one throughput assumption (~1,000 tok/s on H100-class); halve the throughput and the floor doubles.
blind_spots_zh: token 揭露零碎且口徑不一——逐模型 vs 全平台、僅 API vs 含內部、輸入/輸出/快取 token 計法各異。增速只在同平台內計算。
「能力調整後」的通縮無法精確量化:同價買到更聰明的模型,所以 $/token 低估了真實通縮(同價更聰明 ≠ 同 token)。
OpenRouter live 樣本偏開發者長尾——不代表企業直約或巨頭內部流量。
內部 token 消耗(Google 搜尋 AI、Workspace)沒有市場價格——其變現率天生不可觀測。
已實現 $/M 把訂閱營收攤到 API 口徑的 token 上——是推算混合值,不是帳面數字。
各平台營收 run-rate 與 token 量的揭露時點不同;增速比較帶有時間差誤差。
推論成本地板建立在單一吞吐假設(H100 級約 1,000 tok/s);吞吐砍半,地板就翻倍。
